name: Lamb Stew with Artichokes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cube the lamb.
2. Quarter the onions.
3. In a Dutch oven, quickly brown the meat and onions in oil over medium-high heat.
4. Lower the heat and sprinkle flour into the pan. Stir until well blended.
5. Add salt and enough water to just cover the meat. Simmer, uncovered, until the meat is half done.
6. Prepare the artichokes by cutting off the tops and removing the small outer tough leaves. With scissors, square cut each remaining leaf. Place in cold water with a few drops of lemon juice. Drain and stand them on top of the meat.
7. Chop mint leaves and mix with lemon juice; spoon over the artichokes.
8. Lightly salt the onions.
9. Scatter chopped onions over the artichokes and meat.
10. Cover tightly and simmer until both the artichokes and lamb are done, about 12 hours.
11. Remove the artichokes and meat and arrange on a platter.
12. Beat eggs, add lemon juice and salt. Add some broth and mix well. Add back into the remaining broth and cook over low heat until thickened, stirring constantly. Pour over the meat and serve with good ol' Oriental sticky rice or noodles.
